response.name: List of matching lobbies

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: bearer

The Unity Lobby REST API provides endpoints for creating, managing, and querying multiplayer game lobbies. Lobbies allow players to group together before starting a game session. Supports public lobbies with search/filter, private lobbies with join codes, lobby data for game configuration, and player data for per-player attributes.
